name: Mustard Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the beef into 2 steaks.
2. Season each steak with pepper.
3. Cook the steaks in hot butter for 2 minutes on each side, or longer if desired doneness is reached.
4. Season the steaks with salt.
5. Remove the steaks to a warm plate.
6. Add 1 tablespoon of butter to the pan.
7. Add the shallots and mushrooms and cook until all liquid has evaporated.
8. Deglaze the pan with vodka.
9. Cook for an additional minute.
10. Stir in the mustard and cook for another minute.
11. Stir in the cream and check seasonings.
12. Quickly reheat the steaks.
13. Serve with rosti potatoes or rice.
Miriam Podcameni Posvolsky
All of the above freeze well
